records.stderr_pattern: fatal error: Python\.h: No such file or directory|fatal error: python.*\.h
records.description: Missing Python.h header — python3-dev package likely not installed; set CFLAGS to include path as workaround

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "_polaris_repro_build.c:1:10: fatal error: Python.h: No such file or directory" >&2; exit 1' 2>&1 || true
reproduction.expected_stderr_match: fatal error.*Python\.h|No such file or directory
reproduction.fix_command: bash -c 'echo "compilation complete (simulated with CFLAGS include path)"; exit 0' 2>&1 || true

records.stderr_pattern: error: command '(gcc|g\+\+|cc|c\+\+)' failed|error: linker `cc` not found
records.description: C/C++ compiler not found or failed — ensure CC/CXX env vars point to installed compiler

reproduction.command: CC=/nonexistent_gcc python3 -c "import subprocess; subprocess.run(['/nonexistent_gcc', '--version'], check=True)" 2>&1 || true
reproduction.expected_stderr_match: No such file or directory|not found

records.stderr_pattern: Failed building wheel for|error: subprocess-exited-with-error.*Building wheel
records.description: Wheel build failed — likely missing system build dependencies; report to user

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "ERROR: Failed building wheel for _polaris_nonexistent_pkg_build" >&2; echo "  error: subprocess-exited-with-error Building wheel for _polaris_nonexistent_pkg_build" >&2; exit 1' 2>&1 || true
reproduction.fix_command: bash -c 'echo "Build isolation disabled — delegating to system build tools (simulated)"; exit 0' 2>&1 || true
